---
title: "Learning Parameters of Dynamical Systems"
---

# Basic Examples

### 1. [Intro to SIR models and Euler's Method](example_SIR.ipynb)

### 2. [Intro to MCMC and Inference for State Space Models](MCMC.ipynb)

# Advanced Examples

### 1. [Visual of Hamiltonian Monte Carlo for 1-D Distributions](HMC_ANI.ipynb)
